subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God, the King, the Mighty, the Great, sent down from the heaven of utterance from the presence of One Who is All-Knowing, All-Informed. Blessed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الله الملک العزیز العظیم نزلت من جبروت البیان من لدن علیم خبیر طوبی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @knowledge; recognition of God
